productDisplayName: Levis Men Comfort Style Grey Innerwear Vest
description: Soft and absorbent 100% combed cotton vest. This is a grey vest with bold black trim, it has a square shaped neck and armhole binding which forms the straps over the shoulder. The Levi's logo features prominently on the back neck plus the signature red tag is stitched to the bottom hem Wash care Machine wash Do not bleach Tumble dry low Warm iron as needed Do not dry clean Sporty shape and prominent Levi's logo combine to create a ultra masculine vest to be worn under any outfit. The final product delivered might vary in colour and prints from the display here.
